Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to an antivirus server. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to an antivirus server on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to an antivirus server and accessed a new object in shared network resource "{object.storage.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The object is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to an antivirus server on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} used new logon type {logon_type} ({datafield6}) to log in to an antivirus server on host {event_src.host}. The logon type is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to an antivirus server and accessed new shared network resource "{object.storage.path}" on host {event_src.host}. The network resource is missing from the collected profile.
